name: Short-head tertiary · hard · choke
expected_band: choke-fed on hard ore — tightest classification, high specific energy

engine.model: Whiten population balance + Evertsson capacity + Bond power (pure-TS, runs live); a surrogate MLP emulates that engine, a denoising AE scores operating anomaly/OOD. The surrogate is held-out vs an independent 2nd LHS draw of the engine (NOT a real plant); the engine itself is calibrated to published cone data (Duarte et al. 2021).

flags: cssMm=160 outside cone-sec envelope [6,90] — surrogate extrapolating (deep-AE anomaly is the live guard)
cssMm=160 >= feed F63=90 — pass-through regime (near-zero reduction)

honesty: The physics engine is the source of truth and the surrogate emulates IT (not a real plant). The 3D chamber is a kinematic animation; the offline 2-D DEM tracer is the documented next increment. Negative/invalid controls (pass-through, CSS>feed-top) must show ~zero reduction / flag invalidity.
